phases.name: MVP 1 — Core practice app
phases.goal: Pattern list, practice flow, local progress tracking, weakness + motivation basics.

phases.name: MVP 2 — Adaptive progression
phases.goal: Pattern tree progression, reinforcement, review later, mastery score.

phases.name: MVP 3 — Artifact helper (rule-based)
phases.goal: Static hints/explanations/common mistakes + rule-based answer builder.

phases.name: MVP 4 — Local semantic search
phases.goal: Transformers.js embeddings + IndexedDB vector index + semantic retrieval.

phases.name: MVP 5 — Distilled model pipeline
phases.goal: Offline Spider distillation, ONNX export/quantize, run locally in browser.

tasks.description: Scaffold React+Vite+TS app, Tailwind, routing, Zustand. Establish folder structure from brief.
Create initial `src/artifacts/` JSON files (patterns, questions, patternTrees, hints, explanations).
Implement localStorage progress repository + models (QuestionProgress, PatternProgress, UserProgress).
Implement weakness scoring from local progress (attempt ratio, repeated fails, skips, fail-on-easy).
Implement question selection for Pattern Practice + Random Practice with weak/in-progress/unexplored bias.
Add app shell: layout, theme (dark-first), navigation routes (Home/Patterns/Practice/Progress).
Implement Pattern Selection page with pattern cards, progress summary, continue actions.
Implement Practice page (question card, solved/unsolved/skip, hint button, 'why picked').
Implement Home dashboard sections: continue, weak patterns, streak, start practice CTAs.
Implement Progress dashboard: totals, pattern-wise progress, weak/strong patterns, recent activity.
Implement motivation message selection based on recent outcomes (solve/fail/repeated fail/return).
Add Motivation banner/empty states and integrate with motivation engine on practice flow.
Implement pattern tree progression (current node, onSolved/onFailed transitions).
Add review-later list + UI + selection bias towards review-later followups.
Compute mastery score per pattern (blend solved/attempted, difficulty, recency).
Implement rule-based helper that pulls from artifacts (hints/explanations/mistakes) with hint-first answers.
Add Transformers.js embedding client + chunking strategy for artifacts.
Persist embeddings + semantic index in IndexedDB (idb).
Implement semantic search over wiki/artifacts; integrate into Ask Helper UI surface.
Offline: build Spider distillation pipeline + dataset formats + ONNX export + quantization plan.
